languages.text: "...Йекхмет, некогда царствовавшей над этим регионом. Великий Сон искалечил их разум и оставил их неполноценными, подверженными искажениям. Конечно же, я счел своим долгом изъять из их собственности ценные для истории объекты".

traits.locale_text: "Реликвии династии Йекхмет, некогда царствовавшей над этим регионом. Биоперенос искалечил их души и оставил их неполноценными, подверженными искажениям разума. Конечно же, я счел своим долгом изъять из их собственности ценные для истории объекты".

languages.text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."
languages.original_text: "...Йекхмет, некогда царствовавшей над этим регионом. Великий Сон искалечил их разум и оставил их неполноценными, подверженными искажениям. Конечно же, я счел своим долгом изъять из их собственности ценные для истории объекты".

traits.locale_text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

"Relics of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. Biotransference crippled their souls and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions of the mind. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

"Relics of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. Biotransference crippled their souls and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions of the mind. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

"...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

languages.text: “……他们属于叶赫迈特王朝，这个王朝曾统治过这片区域。大休眠摧残了他们的心智，使他们变得残缺不全，容易失常。而我自觉有义务将具有历史价值的东西从他们手里收走。”
languages.original_text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

traits.locale_text: “……他们属于叶赫迈特王朝，这个王朝曾统治过这片区域。大休眠摧残了他们的心智，使他们变得残缺不全，容易失常。而我自觉有义务将具有历史价值的东西从他们手里收走。”

languages.text: «... de la dinastía Yekhmet, que en su día gobernó esta región. El Gran Letargo mutiló sus mente y los dejó defectuosos, vulnerables a distorsiones. Naturalmente, consideré mi deber arrebatarles los objetos de valor histórico».
languages.original_text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

traits.locale_text: «... de la dinastía Yekhmet, que en su día gobernó esta región. El Gran Letargo mutiló sus mente y los dejó defectuosos, vulnerables a distorsiones. Naturalmente, consideré mi deber arrebatarles los objetos de valor histórico».

languages.text: « ... de la dynastie Yekhmet, qui régna autrefois sur la région. Le Long Sommeil a amoindri leurs âmes et les a laissés vulnérables aux distorsions. Bien entendu, il était de mon devoir de m'approprier tout objet en leur possession présentant une quelconque valeur historique. »
languages.original_text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

traits.locale_text: « ... de la dynastie Yekhmet, qui régna autrefois sur la région. Le Long Sommeil a amoindri leurs âmes et les a laissés vulnérables aux distorsions. Bien entendu, il était de mon devoir de m'approprier tout objet en leur possession présentant une quelconque valeur historique. »

languages.text: "Bu bölgede hüküm süren Yekhmet hanedanlığının yadigârları. Ulu Uyku, zihinlerini sakatladı. Onları kusurlu, çarpıtmalara karşı savunmasız bıraktı. Tarihî değeri olan nesneleri onların ellerinden almayı kendime görev bildim."
languages.original_text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

traits.locale_text: "Bu bölgede hüküm süren Yekhmet hanedanlığının yadigârları. Ulu Uyku, zihinlerini sakatladı. Onları kusurlu, çarpıtmalara karşı savunmasız bıraktı. Tarihî değeri olan nesneleri onların ellerinden almayı kendime görev bildim."

languages.text: "... der Yekhmet-Dynastie, die einst über diese Region herrschte. Der Große Schlaf hat ihren Verstand verkrüppelt und sie verwundbar durch Störungen gemacht. Ich hielt es natürlich für meine Pflicht, ihnen Objekte von historischem Wert abzunehmen."
languages.original_text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

traits.locale_text: "... der Yekhmet-Dynastie, die einst über diese Region herrschte. Der Große Schlaf hat ihren Verstand verkrüppelt und sie verwundbar durch Störungen gemacht. Ich hielt es natürlich für meine Pflicht, ihnen Objekte von historischem Wert abzunehmen."

languages.text: 「...この地域を治めたエフメト朝の王族。大眠は彼らの心を蝕み、歪んだ存在へと変えてしまった。もちろん、歴史的価値のあるものを彼らから奪うのは、私の義務だと感じた。」
languages.original_text: "...of the Yekhmet dynasty, which once reigned over this region. The Great Sleep crippled their minds and left them defective, vulnerable to distortions. Of course, I felt it my duty to remove objects of historical value from their possession."

traits.locale_text: 「...この地域を治めたエフメト朝の王族。大眠は彼らの心を蝕み、歪んだ存在へと変えてしまった。もちろん、歴史的価値のあるものを彼らから奪うのは、私の義務だと感じた。」
